case_title: CITY AND COUNTY SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR VS. FERNANDO CALIXTRO JR

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT CALIXTRO JR, FERNANDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-11-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-11-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-11-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. MEI LEW APPEARS FOR THE PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. CLERKS: S. VANTREE AND L.FONG. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION RE: CHANGE OF ADDRESS OF DEFENDANT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-11-2016 - JUDGMENT.
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESS, UNABLE TO FORWARD AS TO DEFENDANT CALIXTRO JR, FERNANDO

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALIXTRO JR, FERNANDO $5,060.99 PRINCIPAL, $2,471.04 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,532.03

PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR SERVED FEB-24-2026, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT CALIXTRO JR, FERNANDO PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON MAY-01-2026 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $60.99 SERVED MAR-04-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CALIXTRO JR, FERNANDO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALIXTRO JR, FERNANDO $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.99 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,060.99 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
